NPC.name: Zombie King
NPC.desc: Likes extra Brains, Guts, and blood!

NPC.name: Nuclear Winter
NPC.desc: The Boss Golem of all Ice Elementals, driven by pure cold heartedness.

NPC.name: Ice Elemental
NPC.desc: An ice golem, driven by pure cold heartedness.

NPC.name: Ice Goblin General
NPC.desc: An ice goblin general, driven by pure cold heartedness.

NPC.desc: An ice goblin, driven by pure cold heartedness.

NPC.desc: An ice goblin gunner, driven by pure cold heartedness.

NPC.name: Ice Kobolt
NPC.desc: An ice kobolt, driven by pure cold heartedness.
